args: for root in "${AWAC_AI_AGENT_PLUGINS_ROOT:-}" "$HOME/projects/awac-ai-agent-plugins" "$HOME/projects/awac-claude-code-plugins"; do [ -n "$root" ] || continue; script="$root/plugins/obsidian-tracker/mcp/run-server.sh"; [ -x "$script" ] && exec "$script"; done; echo "obsidian-tracker MCP server not found" >&2; exit 1
